title: Damon and Pythias
writer: Samuel Marx, Franco Riganti, Paola Ojetti
actors: Guy Williams, Don Burnett, Ilaria Occhini
plot: Pythias, a liberal Athenian who believes all men are brothers, is condemned to death by Dionysus, the tyrant of Syracuse, who finds this view dangerous. However, Dionysus allows Pythias to return to Athens to visit his ailing wife...
